summary_text: ## Medical AI Governance Medical AI should be governed as an accountability system, not just a model-quality problem. In high-stakes care, explanation, auditability, and human judgment stay mandatory at the decision boundary. - Decision: Require traceable evidence for each recommendation, including source data, model version, and reviewer sign-off. - Decision: Keep final clinical authority with licensed humans for any action that changes diagnosis, treatment, or triage. - Open question: What minimal audit trail is enough to support review without slowing care delivery? consulted_worldview_source: /Users/masayuki/.claude/docs/philosophy.md used_obsidian_for_worldview: no worldview_contract_applied: true
